meta_title: For Founders: SaaS pricing to Solve no project ideas (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no project ideas. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: SaaS Pricing to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with no project ideas. Learn to use SaaS pricing as a product discovery tool with this advanced guide using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop searching for 'the perfect idea' and start building a pricing-first experiment. By defining a high-ticket value proposition and a tiered pricing model before writing code, you validate market demand. Use Antigravity to scaffold your MVP and Claude Code to iterate based on real-world conversion signals.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You’re waiting for a lightning-strike epiphany, but the most successful SaaS founders don't find ideas—they engineer them through the lens of value capture. If you don't know what to build, you aren't looking at the right problems; you're looking for features instead of revenue streams.

True product-market fit starts with pricing architecture. When you force yourself to define exactly who pays, how much, and why, the 'idea' reveals itself as a necessary utility. This guide moves you past the paralysis of analysis, leveraging modern autonomous agents to turn your pricing hypothesis into a high-converting MVP.

steps.title: Define the Value-Based Pricing Tier
steps.description: Identify a high-friction business process. Instead of building a tool, build a solution that saves the user more than it costs. Set your pricing anchor based on the 'cost of manual labor' you are replacing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze a high-friction B2B workflow in legal document review. Propose a tiered pricing structure based on 'value delivered' rather than 'user count'. Output a JSON schema for a subscription model.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Create a pricing.ts file defining the three tiers identified in the research.'

steps.title: Build the Revenue-First Landing Page
steps.description: Your MVP is your landing page. Before coding the app, create a high-conversion checkout flow. If nobody clicks 'Subscribe', you don't have a product idea worth building.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React landing page component for a SaaS tool using Tailwind CSS. Include a pricing table with a 'Most Popular' highlight and a Stripe checkout integration placeholder.

steps.title: Implement Autonomous Usage Tracking
steps.description: Use Claude Code to instrument your app so you can see exactly which features drive usage. Pricing should be dynamic based on the value metrics discovered during the beta.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Architect a usage-tracking middleware for a Next.js API that logs feature consumption to a Supabase database.

steps.title: Automate the Feedback Loop
steps.description: Connect your pricing conversion data to an LLM agent that analyzes why users drop off at the paywall. Pivot your feature set based on this feedback.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an automated feedback analysis script that reads Stripe webhook logs and generates a summary of churn reasons.

steps.title: Scale via Iterative Pricing Experiments
steps.description: Use your infrastructure to run A/B tests on pricing. Claude Code can help you deploy environment-specific pricing configurations instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Develop a strategy for dynamic A/B pricing testing using Vercel Edge Config.

pro_tips: Never build a 'free' tier; it attracts users who provide zero feedback and high support costs.
Price your MVP at 20% of the cost of the manual alternative to ensure instant 'no-brainer' adoption.
Use Stripe's 'metered billing' to capture upside as your users grow, effectively aligning your incentives.
If you aren't embarrassed by your first version, you launched too late—use that time to refine the pricing model instead.
Treat your pricing page as a dynamic product feature that changes based on user behavior patterns.
content.next_steps: Deploy your landing page to Vercel, run your first pricing experiment, and monitor the conversion rate for 48 hours before adding a single line of feature code.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect idea and start building the perfect business model. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
